content: Prisma 6 does NOT have native SELECT FOR UPDATE support in its query API (open feature request since 2019). Three workarounds: 1) Raw SQL inside transaction: await tx.$queryRaw`SELECT id FROM products WHERE id = ${id} FOR UPDATE`; 2) Higher isolation level (RepeatableRead or Serializable) to detect write conflicts — Prisma returns P2034 on serialization failure; 3) Optimistic locking: read version/stock value, check at write time, rely on DB CHECK constraint as hard backstop. For SME scale with infrequent concurrent stock writes, application-level check inside ReadCommitted transaction plus DB CHECK constraint (currentStock >= 0) is the pragmatic choice.
